name: asdf
description: Extendable version manager with support for Ruby, Node.js, Elixir, Erlang & more

subcommands.name: plugin
subcommands.description: Plugin management sub-commands

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add a plugin from the plugin repo OR, add a Git repo as a plugin by specifying the name and repo url

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List installed plugins. Optionally show git urls and git-ref

subcommands.name: all
subcommands.description: List plugins registered on asdf-plugins repository with URLs

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove plugin and package versions

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update a plugin to latest commit on default branch or a particular git-ref

options.description: Update all plugins to latest commit on default branch

subcommands.name: plugin-add
subcommands.description: Add a plugin from the plugin repo OR, add a Git repo as a plugin by specifying the name and repo url

subcommands.name: plugin-list
subcommands.description: List installed plugins. Optionally show git urls and git-ref

subcommands.name: all
subcommands.description: List plugins registered on asdf-plugins repository with URLs

subcommands.name: plugin-list-all
subcommands.description: List plugins registered on asdf-plugins repository with URLs

subcommands.name: plugin-remove
subcommands.description: Remove plugin and package versions

subcommands.name: plugin-update
subcommands.description: Update a plugin to latest commit on default branch or a particular git-ref

options.description: Update all plugins to latest commit on default branch

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install plugin at stated version, or all from .tools-versions

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Remove a specific version of a package

subcommands.name: current
subcommands.description: Display current versions for named package (else all)

subcommands.name: where
subcommands.description: Display install path for given package at optional specified version

subcommands.name: which
subcommands.description: Display path to an executable

subcommands.name: local
subcommands.description: Set package local version

subcommands.name: global
subcommands.description: Set package global version

subcommands.name: shell
subcommands.description: Set the package version to ASDF_${LANG}_VERSION` in the current shell

subcommands.name: latest
subcommands.description: Display latest version available to install for a named package

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List installed versions of a package

subcommands.name: all
subcommands.description: List all available (remote) versions of a package

subcommands.name: list-all
subcommands.description: List all available (remote) versions of a package

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Output documentation for plugin and tool

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Executes the command shim for the current version

subcommands.name: env
subcommands.description: Prints or runs an executable under a command environment

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Print os, shell and asdf debug information

subcommands.name: reshim
subcommands.description: Recreate shims for version of a package

subcommands.name: shim
subcommands.description: Shim management sub-commands

subcommands.name: versions
subcommands.description: List for given command which plugins and versions provide it

subcommands.name: shim-versions
subcommands.description: List for given command which plugins and versions provide it

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update ASDF to the latest stable release (unless --head)

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Version for asdf
